overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a long dark coat and hat walking along a misty forest trail beside a rushing river. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with dense fog, tall pine trees, lush ferns, and rocky terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail between steep rock cliff and pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path with a steep rock face on the left and dense forest on the right

entered.detail: steep moss-covered rock wall lining the left side of the path
dense forest of tall evergreen trees towering overhead
dense forest of tall evergreen trees on the right side
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest
misty river barely visible through the trees and fog on the right

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail hugging a steep mossy rock cliff on the left, with dense pine forest on the right. The atmosphere is thick with fog, and a river is faintly visible through the mist in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest trail with fern undergrowth and river views

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the terrain opens up, revealing the rushing river more clearly on the right

entered.detail: lush green ferns lining the left side of the path
lush green ferns lining the right side of the path
fast-flowing river with visible white water rapids becoming prominent

segments.scene_description: The rock cliff recedes as the trail opens into a wider forest area with lush fern undergrowth on both sides. The river becomes clearly visible on the right, showing white water rapids through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverside trail with fallen timber

events.description: horse rider appears ahead on the path and passes by going the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky riverside path and moving slightly aside to let the horse rider pass by

notable_agents.action: horse with rider trotting toward the camera along the path, then passing by in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large fallen tree trunk lying on the ground near the riverbank
rocky terrain and boulders along the edge of the rushing river

segments.scene_description: The path becomes rockier as it hugs the riverbank more closely. A horse rider appears ahead and passes by going the opposite direction. Fallen timber and rocky outcrops line the right side near the rushing water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a misty forest trail that gradually opens up to reveal a rushing river. It begins with the character navigating a narrow dirt path squeezed between a steep mossy rock cliff and a dense pine forest under a thick blanket of fog. As the cliff recedes, the trail expands into a wider woodland area where lush fern undergrowth flourishes and the distant mist parts to reveal white water rapids. The scene then shifts as the path becomes rockier and hugs the riverbank more closely, passing fallen timber and rocky outcrops. Finally, the camera follows the character as a horse rider appears from the mist and passes by in the opposite direction.
